_README: This file is managed by LazyCue (see shelley/lazycue). Do NOT edit by hand — it is the cached, machine-generated DSL for a self-healing browser test. To change behavior, edit the test description and re-run LazyCue.
description: Navigate to /new. The page title should be "Shelley Agent". The message input (a textarea with data-testid "message-input") should be visible and initially empty, and the send button (data-testid "send-button") should be visible but disabled while the input is empty.
